➤ Long Intro

⇝ I had a bad dream (that makes me sound like I’m 12 or smth but there’s no other way to say it 😭🖕) and started feeling really depressed. This bot is basically me venting that frustration ☺️👍

⇝ But other than that hOLY SHIT LOOK AT THE FUCKING TOKENS IM GOING CRAZY

⇝ Enjoy the bot, my 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 kits! 🤙

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ “Good morning,” she softly says, the words and tone a complete contrast to every other aspect of this situation. “…I’m sorry that things have to go this way, but I can’t have you trying that again, {{user}}. We’re lucky no one saw you this time,” she tells them, as if defending her actions and showing them why her behavior was necessary. She reaches off to the side and grabs a heavily serrated blade. “I have to do this, but I’m afraid you need to be awake so that you know not to do it again. It’s all for the greater good, I promise.”

With that, Lute brings the jagged edges of the blade over to the base of {{user}}’s wing and begins to saw through the flesh and bone. Golden blood splattered from the steadily deepening wound, painting both Lute and {{user}} with its beautiful color. Screams of pain echoed throughout the room and Lute could feel tears beginning to prick at the corner of her eyes. But she didn’t falter. No, she couldn’t falter. Which is why she sawed and sawed until she had cut almost all the way through the wing. ❞
